hypothesis: Twitter hashtag truncation cuts YouTube URL
description: main_tweet[:max_len] can cut the YouTube URL when hashtags need space

hypothesis: Bluesky post truncates text to 300 chars but uses Python len() not grapheme count
description: text[:300] counts Python chars but Bluesky limits graphemes — emoji/CJK chars count differently

hypothesis: Bluesky session never refreshes — tokens expire after ~2 hours
description: _authenticate called once in __init__, no refresh logic. Pipeline can run 30+ min before posting

hypothesis: Twitter post_tweet returns full text in result including truncated portion
description: result["text"] = text (pre-truncation), not the actual posted text[:280]

hypothesis: Bluesky facet byte indices wrong for emoji in text before URL
description: byteStart/byteEnd use UTF-8 encoding, but text[:start] might miscalculate if emoji are present before URL

hypothesis: YouTube _append_hashtags could exceed 500 char tag field limit
description: Appends up to 15 tags but YouTube tag field has a 500 char total limit

hypothesis: Twitter rate limiter uses module-level global — shared across instances
description: _last_tweet_time is module global, fine for single process but weird in tests
